seo.title: Medicine Pharmacy — Consult Doctors. Get Medicine. From Home.
seo.description: A modern telemedicine platform. Connect with verified doctors, get e-prescriptions, and have authentic medicine delivered to your door.

hero.headline: Care, delivered to your doorstep.
hero.tagline: Talk to a verified doctor in minutes. Get your prescription, your medicines, and your lab tests — all without leaving home.

about.description: Medicine Pharmacy is built around one simple idea — quality care should be just a tap away. We bring together licensed doctors, certified pharmacists, and accredited diagnostic labs onto a single, trusted platform. From a fever at midnight to managing a long-term condition, we make every step calmer, faster, and more affordable.

services.title: Online Consultations
services.description: Connect with verified doctors across 25+ specialties via video or chat — usually within ten minutes, any day of the week.

services.title: E-Prescriptions
services.description: Receive a digitally signed, valid prescription right after your consultation — saved to your account, ready when you need it.

services.title: Medicine Delivery
services.description: Authentic, temperature-controlled medicines sourced from licensed partner pharmacies, delivered to your doorstep — often the same day.

services.title: Lab Tests at Home
services.description: NABL-accredited diagnostic services with home sample collection and digital reports — over 1,500 tests available across major cities.

images.alt: Organised pharmacy shelves with prescription medicines
images.caption: Curated pharmacy network

images.alt: Doctor consulting a patient via tablet
images.caption: Verified clinicians

images.alt: Lab technician examining a sample under microscope
images.caption: Accredited diagnostics

items.title: Verified, licensed doctors
items.description: Every clinician on our platform is verified against the National Medical Commission registry — no shortcuts.

items.title: Authentic medicines, always
items.description: We work only with licensed partner pharmacies and validate batch authenticity on every order.

items.title: End-to-end encrypted records
items.description: Consultations, prescriptions, and reports stay private — encrypted at rest and in transit, owned by you.

items.title: Transparent, upfront pricing
items.description: See the cost of every consultation, medicine and test before you confirm — no surprise charges, ever.

steps.title: Describe your concern
steps.description: Tell us what's going on in a few words. Pick a specialty, or let us suggest one.

steps.title: Talk to a verified doctor
steps.description: Connect by video or chat — usually in under ten minutes. Get diagnosed, advised, and prescribed.

steps.title: Medicines & reports at home
steps.description: Order medicines, schedule a lab test, or simply save your e-prescription — all from a single dashboard.

contact.address: Floor 8, Prestige Cube, Outer Ring Road, Marathahalli, Bengaluru 560037

compliance.disclaimer: Medicine Pharmacy is an informational platform that connects patients with licensed clinicians and partner pharmacies. The content on this website is intended for general awareness and is not a substitute for professional medical diagnosis, advice, or treatment. Always consult a qualified medical practitioner for any health concern. Medicines are dispensed by licensed pharmacies in accordance with applicable regulations and only against a valid prescription where required.
